description: Curated external plugin marketplaces endorsed by Roxabi. Source of truth: .claude-plugin/external-registry.json (curated_marketplaces array) — this file mirrors it for Claude Code runtime discovery. Install via: claude plugin marketplace add <source>.

marketplaces.name: agent-browser
marketplaces.description: Headless browser automation CLI for AI agents — navigate, click, fill, screenshot, scrape.
